code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
    if is_space(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      mut j = i
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        j = j + 1
      else if b == 43
        j = j + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if j >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          let c = byte_at_or(s, j)
          if is_digit(c)
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            j = j + 1
          else
            scanning = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn parse_target(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let target = parse_target(line2)
  let n = list.len(nums)
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n and not found
      let a = get_or(nums, i)
      let b = get_or(nums, j)
      if a + b == target
        found = true
        fi = i
        fj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
